config.task: Schema Design Review: Audit Prisma schema for V.Two Ops ATS platform. Brief: recruiting (candidate→hire), onboarding/offboarding with tracks, device inventory, basic auth. Current schema: has Candidate/Employee/Device foundation. Missing: ConfigList (dropdowns), Client, Resume versioning, Interview/Interviewer, Offer, TrackTemplate/TaskTemplate structure. CHALLENGE the structure: Is the brief schema correct? Missing elements? Optimize for: query performance, token efficiency, simplicity. Output comprehensive audit.
